folio.label: 186v
folio.l: And keuere hire brigút face , witú a cloude

note.notetxt: 680Cross in dry point in the right margin.ODR

folio.l: ¢ O noble , o worthy Petre , glorie of spayne
Whom fortune helde , so heigú in mageste
Wel ougúten men , thy pytous detú compleyne
Out of thy lond , thy brother mad the flee
And after at a Sege , by sotiltee

note.notetxt: 686 Line 686 is missing and there is a one-line space.Est

folio.l: Where as he , witú his owen hand slow the
Succedyngö in thy regne , & in thy rente
¢ The felde of snow , w the Egle of blak æäe Inne
Kaugút w the lyme rod , coloured as the glede
He brewetú this cursednesse , & al this synne
The wykked nest , was wirker of this nede
Nougút , Charles , Olyuer , æ toke ay hede
Of trouthe & honour , but of Armorike
Genylou~ , Olyuer , corrupt for mede
Brougút this worthy knygút , in swicú a brike
¢ O worthy Petro , kyngö of Cipre also
That Alisaundre wan , by heigú maistrie
Ful many an hethen , wrougútestow ful woo
Of whicú thyne owne lieges , hadden envye
And for no thyngö , but for thy Chyualrie
They in thy bed , han slayn the by the morwe
Thus kan fortune , hire whel gouäne & gye
And out of ioye , brynge men to sorwe

note.notetxt: 704Cross in dry point in the right margin.ODR

folio.l: ¢ Of Melan , gret Barnabo , viscounte
God of delit , and Skourge of lumbardye
Why shulde I nougút , thyn Infortune Acompte
Sithe in estat , æè clombe were so heigúe
Thy brothers Sone , æ was thy double allye
For he thy nevew was , & sone in lawe
Witú Inne his pésou~ , made the to dye
But why , ne how not I , æ æè were slawe
¢ Of the Erl Hugelyn , of Pize the langoå
There may no tonge tellen , for pitee
But litel out of Pize , stant a Tour
In whicú Tour , in prisou~ put was he
And witú hi~ ben , hise litel children three
The eldest skarsely , fyue ©er was of age
Allas fortune , it was gret crueltee
Swicú Briddes , for to putte , in swicú a cage
¢ Dampned was he , to dye in æ prisou~
For Roger , whicú æt Busshop~ was , of Pize
Had on hi~ mad , a fals suggestiou~
Thurgú whicú the peeple , gan vp oon hi~ rise
